company_description: Ramp is a finance automation platform helping companies spend less.
Brex is a financial services company that offers business credit cards and cash management accounts.
Rippling is a platform that helps businesses manage HR payroll and IT in one place.
Notion is an all-in-one workspace for notes docs and collaboration powered by AI.
Linear is a project management tool designed for high-performance software teams.
Retool is a platform for building internal software and business apps using AI.
Loom is a video messaging platform used by engineering and product teams.
Scale AI provides high-quality training data for AI applications and LLMs.
W&B is a developer platform for ML experiment tracking and model management.
Glean is an AI-powered enterprise search and knowledge platform.
Harvey is an AI platform for legal and professional services.
Cohere provides NLP models and inference infrastructure for enterprise teams.
Speechify converts text to speech using AI for accessibility and productivity.
Descript is an all-in-one audio and video editing platform powered by AI.
Playground AI is a creative image generation platform using diffusion models.
Runway is a creative AI platform for video generation and editing.
Midjourney is an AI research lab producing image generation models.
Gong is a revenue intelligence platform using AI to analyze sales conversations.
Observe.AI is a conversation intelligence platform for contact centers.
Anomalo is a data quality monitoring platform for modern data warehouses.
Vanta automates security compliance for SOC 2 ISO 27001 and other frameworks.
Hex is a collaborative data platform for data science and analytics.
Stytch provides authentication and identity infrastructure for modern applications.
Merge is a unified API platform for HR payroll accounting and ATS integrations.
Secureframe helps companies get and stay compliant with security frameworks.
